description:
**Milestone:** Trajectory Store & Learning Flywheel

Add a verifyPlan(feature, planText) method to the existing AntagonisticReviewService that routes the plan through the existing LangGraph antagonistic-review flow. Wire it into PlanProcessor as an optional gate: for features with complexity 'large' or 'architectural', call verifyPlan() after plan generation and before returning success. If the critic returns a 'block' verdict, treat it as a plan rejection (same path as validatePlan() failure). If it returns 'concern', append the concerns to the plan output as annotated warnings.

Reuse the existing graph.ts and review nodes (ava-review.ts, jon-review.ts). The plan text is passed as the 'document' to review. Return a PlanVerificationResult with avaVerdict, jonVerdict, consensus, concerns[], and recommendations[].

**Files to Modify:**
- libs/types/src/lead-engineer.ts
- apps/server/src/services/antagonistic-review-service.ts
- apps/server/src/services/lead-engineer-service.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] PlanVerificationResult type added to libs/types/src/lead-engineer.ts
- [ ] AntagonisticReviewService.verifyPlan() executes the review flow and returns structured verdict
- [ ] PlanProcessor calls verifyPlan() for large/architectural complexity features only
- [ ] Block verdict triggers plan rejection with descriptive escalation reason
- [ ] Concern verdict appends annotated warnings to planOutput without blocking
- [ ] Small/medium features bypass verification (no performance regression)
- [ ] npm run build:packages passes
- [ ] npm run build:server passes
- [ ] npm run test:server passes

**Complexity:** medium
title: Antagonistic Plan Verification Gate
